name: Raspberry Cream Loaf
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Sour cream or yogurt (regular or low fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. If your baking machine requires the yeast to be added first, place it in the pan and then add the other dry ingredients.
Otherwise, add the sour cream or yogurt, butter (or canola oil), raspberry extract, raspberry filling, flour, wheat germ, and salt into the pan.
2. Place the yeast on top of the mixture or use its own separate dispenser if your machine has one.
3. Set the machine to its rapid-bake cycle for this loaf.
4. Once cooled enough to slice without difficulty, remove the top and bottom crusts.
5. Cut the remaining square or round into slices 1 to 1 1/2 inches thick.
6. Serve warm with a scoop of raspberry sorbet, a ladling of raspberry syrup, or Raspberry Melba Sauce, and fresh raspberries scattered on top.
